name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentations that actually look considered, not generated.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, visually bland slides that undermine credibility. Teams waste time either fixing AI output or building decks manually from scratch. Chronicle 2.0 bridges that gap by using AI to accelerate structure and content while preserving design integrity.
useCases: Creating polished pitch decks for investor meetings
Building internal strategy or roadmap presentations
Rapidly iterating on slide content without sacrificing visual quality
